statusLine.command: input=$(cat); cwd=$(echo "$input" | grep -o '"current_dir":"[^"]*"' | head -1 | sed 's/"current_dir":"//;s/"$//'); model=$(echo "$input" | grep -o '"display_name":"[^"]*"' | head -1 | sed 's/"display_name":"//;s/"$//'); home=$(echo ~); short_cwd=$(echo "$cwd" | sed "s|^$home|~|"); cd "$cwd" 2>/dev/null; added=$(git log --since="$(date +%Y-%m-%d) 00:00:00" --until="$(date +%Y-%m-%d) 23:59:59" --pretty=format: --numstat 2>/dev/null | awk '{added+=$1} END {printf "%d", added+0}'); removed=$(git log --since="$(date +%Y-%m-%d) 00:00:00" --until="$(date +%Y-%m-%d) 23:59:59" --pretty=format: --numstat 2>/dev/null | awk '{removed+=$2} END {printf "%d", removed+0}'); commits=$(git log --since="$(date +%Y-%m-%d) 00:00:00" --until="$(date +%Y-%m-%d) 23:59:59" --oneline 2>/dev/null | wc -l | tr -d ' '); printf "\033[34m%s\033[0m@\033[35m%s\033[0m:\033[32m%s\033[0m \033[34m+${added}\033[0m/\033[33m-${removed}\033[0m \033[32m${commits}c\033[0m \033[2m${model}\033[0m" "$(whoami)" "$(hostname -s)" "$short_cwd"
